extensionDescription.message: Tam bir sayfayı tek bir HTML dosyasına kaydet

commandSaveSelectedTabs.description: Command (Ctrl+Shift+Y): 'Save the selected tabs or their selected contents'

menuEditAndSavePage.message: Sayfaya açıklama ekle ve sayfayı kaydet...
menuEditAndSavePage.description: Menu entry: 'Annotate and save the page...'

menuUpdateRule.description: Menu entry: 'Select the profile of the current rule'

menuCreateDomainRule.description: Menu entry: 'Select the profile of the current domain'

buttonBlockedBadge.description: Button badge when the page is blocked: '🚫'

buttonBlockedTooltip.description: Button title: 'This page cannot be saved with SingleFile'

buttonSaveProgressTooltip.description: Button title during save: 'Save progress: xx%'

buttonUploadProgressTooltip.description: Button title during save: 'Upload progress: xx%'

buttonAutoSaveActiveBadge.description: Badge label when auto-save is active

optionDisplayShadow.description: Options page label: 'overlay a shadow on the page during processing'

optionDisplayInfobar.description: Options page label: 'display an infobar when viewing a saved page'

optionInfobarTemplate.description: Options page label: 'template of the infobar content'

optionSaveOriginalURLs.description: Options page label: 'save original URLs of embedded resources'

optionIncludeInfobar.description: Options page label: 'include the infobar in the saved page'

optionRemoveInfobarSavedDate.description: Options page label: 'do not include the saved date'

optionConfirmInfobar.description: Options page label: 'open a prompt dialog to edit the infobar content'

optionAutoClose.description: Options page label: 'auto-close the tab after the page is saved'

optionConfirmFilename.description: Options page label: 'open the "Save as" dialog to confirm the file name'

optionCreateRootDirectory.description: Options page label: 'create a root directory'

optionPreventAppendedData.description: Options page label: 'do not append data after the ZIP data'

optionRemoveAlternativeMedias.description: Options page label: 'remove stylesheets for alternative devices to screens'
